title: Mirror Index
description: A lightweight metadata index over all governed artifacts in a private Strategic Mirror instance. Used by Tier 1 MCP tools to answer what exists and what needs attention without opening any artifact file.

index_id.description: Logical identifier for this index snapshot.

generated_at.description: Timestamp when this index was last generated.

path.description: Logical repo-independent artifact identifier. Runtime implementations must map it through a server-owned allowlist.

type.description: Artifact classification. memory and state are governed source layers. pending and applied are proposal lifecycle states. session-note is a bounded session record.

last_modified.description: Timestamp of the most recent write to this artifact.

review_date.description: Date this artifact was last reviewed by the human owner. Null if never reviewed.

status.description: Current operational status of the artifact.

privacy_risk.description: Privacy risk level assessed at proposal time or on indexing.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 digest of the artifact content at last index generation.

is_stale.description: True if the artifact has passed its stale-after date or has not been reviewed within its review cadence.

needs_review.description: True if the artifact requires human review: stale, missing review date, high privacy risk pending, or flagged by hygiene check.

stale_after.description: Date after which this artifact should be reviewed or archived. Applicable to state and pending entries.

review_cadence.description: Expected review frequency for memory entries, e.g. quarterly.
